name: AI Email Summary Agent
description: Fetches recent Gmail inbox emails, uses Claude AI to summarize all messages into a structured daily digest with categories, action items, and priority rankings, then posts the summary to Slack using Block Kit formatting.

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for reading emails

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting the digest

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post the email summary (e.g. '#daily-digest')

hoursBack.description: Number of hours to look back for emails (default: 24)

steps.name: Calculate date filter for recent emails
Build Claude prompt for email summarization
Run Claude AI to summarize emails
Parse Claude AI output and strip fences
Build Slack Block Kit email digest
